mapper.select: SELECT id, title, assignee, category, deadline, status, deleted_at, completed FROM todos WHERE status <> 'DELETED' ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (title, assignee, category, deadline, status, deleted_at, completed) VALUES (#{title}, #{assignee}, #{category}, #{deadline}, #{status}, #{deletedAt}, #{completed})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, assignee = #{assignee}, category = #{category}, deadline = #{deadline}, status = #{status}, deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, completed = #{completed} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE todos SET status = 'DELETE_REQUESTED' WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
UPDATE todos SET status = 'DELETED', deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 'DELETE_REQUESTED'
mapper.select: SELECT id, title, assignee, category, deadline, status, deleted_at, completed FROM todos WHERE status = 'DELETED' ORDER BY deleted_at DESC, id DESC
